Manages user preferences, app transitions, event loops, app states, and watchface interactions in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[prefs.c](prefs.c.md)**: Manages user preferences for clock style, watchface, content size, and activity tracking settings.
- **[shell.c](shell.c.md)**: Functions for retrieving compositor animations for app transitions in the Pebble firmware.
- **[shell_event_loop.c](shell_event_loop.c.md)**: Initializes and handles events for the shell event loop in the Pebble firmware.
- **[shell_sdk.c](shell_sdk.c.md)**: Functions to get, set, and check if the last installed app is a watchface.
- **[shell_sdk.h](shell_sdk.h.md)**: Functions to track and manage the most recently launched installed app.
- **[stubs.c](stubs.c.md)**: Stub implementations for backlight control, app idle timeout, worker preferences, and activity preferences.
- **[system_app_registry_list.json](system_app_registry_list.json.md)**: JSON configuration for system and resource applications in Pebble firmware, with usage directions.
- **[system_app_state_machine.c](system_app_state_machine.c.md)**: Manages app state transitions and error handling for the Pebble firmware system.
- **[watchface.c](watchface.c.md)**: Manages watchface interactions and app launches based on button events for Pebble firmware.
- **[watchface.h](watchface.h.md)**: Functions for initializing and managing watchface events and settings in the Pebble firmware.
